params.summary: Implemented vector DB with contiguous storage, bulk insert, SIMD-accelerated L2 distance (AVX512/AVX2/scalar), and parallel top-k search using rayon with fixed 4-thread pool. Optimized top-k maintenance to avoid heap overhead and ensured sorted results.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented vector DB with contiguous storage, bulk insert, SIMD-accelerated L2 distance (AVX512/AVX2/scalar), and parallel top-k search using rayon with fixed 4-thread pool. Optimized top-k maintenance to avoid heap overhead and ensured sorted results.. Final QPS: 49.27, Recall: 0.9993
